title: Entity Sleep Behavior
description: Allows mobs that own a bed to in a village to move to and sleep in it.

can_sleep_while_riding.title: Can Sleep While Riding
can_sleep_while_riding.description: If true, the mob will be able to use the sleep goal if riding something

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

sleep_collider_height.title: Sleep Collider Height
sleep_collider_height.description: The height of the mob's collider while sleeping

sleep_collider_width.title: Sleep Collider Width
sleep_collider_width.description: The width of the mob's collider while sleeping

sleep_y_offset.title: Sleep y Offset
sleep_y_offset.description: The y offset of the mob's collider while sleeping

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.

timeout_cooldown.title: Timeout Cooldown
timeout_cooldown.description: The cooldown time in seconds before the goal can be reused after a internal failure or timeout condition.
